tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall service custom
edit "HIGH_TCP_EGRESS"
set tcp-portrange 1024-65535
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Deny_High_Egress_Ports"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "HIGH_TCP_EGRESS"
set logtraffic all
next
end

show firewall policy

config firewall ssl-ssh-profile
edit "custom-deep-inspection"
config https
set block-non-fqdn enable
end
next
end

show firewall ssl-ssh-profile"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall service custom

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) # edit "HIGH_TCP_EGRESS"
new entry 'HIGH_TCP_EGRESS' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (HIGH_TCP_EGRESS) # set tcp-portrange 1024-65535

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (HIGH_TCP_EGRESS) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # edit 0
new entry '0' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set name "Deny_High_Egress_Ports"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set srcaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set service "HIGH_TCP_EGRESS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Deny_C2_HTTPS_8443"
        set uuid d4653364-291c-51f1-4e68-2508b12a5ab4
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "C2_Attacker"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "TCP_8443"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 3
        set name "Allow_Egress_With_SSL_Inspection"
        set uuid d479fe2a-291c-51f1-b060-a503199dba31
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set ssl-ssh-profile "custom-deep-inspection"
        set logtraffic all
set nat enable
        set comments "Apply deep inspection for egress and DLP enforcement"
    next
    edit 4
        set name "Deny_High_Egress_Ports"
        set uuid c7dd63e0-291d-51f1-fd5f-c4efcad3b8ab
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HIGH_TCP_EGRESS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall ssl-ssh-profile

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (ssl-ssh-profile) # edit "custom-deep-inspection"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom-deep-insp~ion) # config https

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (https) # set block-non-fqdn enable

command parse error before 'block-non-fqdn'
Command fail. Return code -61

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (https) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom-deep-insp~ion) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (ssl-ssh-profile) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall ssl-ssh-profile
config firewall ssl-ssh-profile
    edit "deep-inspection"
        set comment "Read-only deep inspection profile."
        config https
            set ports 443
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config ftps
            set ports 990
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config imaps
            set ports 993
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config pop3s
            set ports 995
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config smtps
            set ports 465
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config ssh
set ports 22
            set status disable
        end
        config dot
            set status disable
        end
        config ssl-exempt
            edit 1
                set fortiguard-category 31
            next
            edit 2
                set fortiguard-category 33
            next
            edit 3
                set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "adobe"
            next
            edit 4

            next

    edit "custom-deep-inspection"

    edit "no-inspection"
        set comment "Read-only profile that does no inspection."
        config https

        config ftps

        end
        config imaps
            set status disable

        config pop3s
            set status disable
        end
        config smtps
            set status disable

        config ssh
            set ports 22
set status disable

        config dot

    next
    edit "certificate-inspection"
        set comment "Read-only SSL handshake inspection profile."
        config https

        config ftps

        config imaps

config ssh

end
